evals.prompt: Check that the version numbers are in sync across pyproject.toml, cli/Cargo.toml, web/package.json, and cli/src/cli.rs
evals.expected_output: Version sync check result showing whether all 4 version files match.
assertions: Runs python scripts/sync_versions.py to verify versions
Reports which files match or mismatch
Does not modify any files in check-only mode

evals.prompt: Create a patch release for the project using the release script
evals.expected_output: A new patch version bumped across all 4 version files, changelog generated, and a git tag created.
assertions: Version is bumped in pyproject.toml, cli/Cargo.toml, web/package.json, and cli/src/cli.rs
A git tag is created with the new version
